# t22.5 - Final conformance rerun after PM artifact publication race fix

## Summary

Re-ran the final completeness gate after the publication race was resolved for `t21.5-pm.md`.
The only blocking defect carried by `t22.4` was the missing PM rerun artifact itself. That
artifact is now published and reports a PASS for the post-`t21.4.2` evidence bundle, so the
conformance package can consume an authoritative product-signoff input instead of the stale
`t21.3` FAIL state.

With `t21.5` available, the synchronized completeness package flips to PASS: the approved mixed
validation stack has been executed, the DB2 primary lane is proven, the PM parity review is fresh,
and the aggregate traceability package no longer has any partial requirements.

## Deliverables

- [migration-summary.md](./migration-summary.md) - refreshed binary conformance verdict for the final published PM closure state
- [checkpoints/tasks-to-impl.yaml](./checkpoints/tasks-to-impl.yaml) - aggregate completeness checkpoint updated to include `t21.5`
- [checkpoints/traceability-matrix.yaml](./checkpoints/traceability-matrix.yaml) - traceability package refreshed to the final conformance PASS state

## Verdict

- Gate: PASS
- Critical findings: 0
- High findings: 0

## Findings

1. MEDIUM - Residual dependency assurance remains open. `t18.1-security.md` still records Derby `10.14.2.0` below Hibernate's supported minimum and notes the absence of a usable OWASP Dependency-Check report.

## Why The Verdict Flipped

- `t21.4` proved the remaining directly reachable documentation, primitive-launcher,
  alternate-surface, and image-surface inventory on the seeded DB2 primary lane.
- `t21.5` is now published and explicitly approves PM parity sign-off for that final evidence
  bundle instead of leaving `t21.3` as the latest available product verdict.
- No CRITICAL or HIGH finding remains open once the freshness defect on the named upstream PM
  dependency is removed.

## Validation Basis

- Reviewed `t21.5-pm.md` as the authoritative PM parity verdict for the post-`t21.4.2` evidence bundle.
- Reviewed `t22.1-teamlead.md` and the refreshed shared checkpoints as the authoritative aggregate conformance inputs.
- Re-synchronized `migration-summary.md`, `tasks-to-impl.yaml`, and `traceability-matrix.yaml` to the final PM-approved state.

## Test Results

- Command: artifact review only; no narrower executable validation exists for a published-artifact freshness rerun
- Passed: 0
- Failed: 0
- Skipped: 1
